channel.title: WTF Wikipedia
channel.itunes:subtitle: Every episode Oscar and James discuss a random Wikipedia article, and maybe poke fun at it
channel.itunes:author: Oscar

item.itunes:title: Llanfairpwllgwyngyllgogerychwyrndrobwllllantysiliogogogoch - Episode 10
item.title: Llanfairpwllgwyngyllgogerychwyrndrobwllllantysiliogogogoch - Episode 10
item.description:
Oscar and James discuss the Welsh village of llanfairpwllgwyngyllgogerychwyrndrobwllllantysiliogogogoch. Try saying that 10 times in a row.

Shownotes:
https://www.wikiwand.com/en/Llanfairpwllgwyngyll

item.itunes:title: Nazi UFOs and rearranging Oscar's setup - Episode 9
item.title: Nazi UFOs and rearranging Oscar's setup - Episode 9
item.description:
In this episode, Oscar and James discuss Nazi UFOs and Oscar decides this is a good time to rearrange his setup.

Show Notes:
https://www.wikiwand.com/en/Nazi_UFOs

item.itunes:title: Thomas Midgely Jr. and staying on topic - Episode 8
item.title: Thomas Midgely Jr. and staying on topic - Episode 8

item.itunes:title: Ruth Bellville and the Time Ball - Episode 7
item.title: Ruth Bellville and the Time Ball - Episode 7
item.description:
In this Episode, Oscar and James discuss Ruth Bellville and the time ball at the royal Greenwich observatory.

Shownotes:
https://www.wikiwand.com/en/Ruth_Belville
https://www.wikiwand.com/en/Royal_Observatory,_Greenwich
https://www.wikiwand.com/en/Time_ball

Visit our website at https://wtfwikipedia.com
Follow us on Instagram @wtfwikipedia
Support Us on Patreon https://www.patreon.com/wtfwikipedia, then James might be able to get a new microphone.

Support the show (https://www.patreon.com/wtfwikipedia)

item.itunes:title: The Dancing plague and laughter epidemics - Episode 5
item.title: The Dancing plague and laughter epidemics - Episode 5
item.description:
In this Episode, Oscar and James discuss the Strasbourg Dancing plague and laughter epidemics in African schools.

Links/Shownotes:

https://www.wikiwand.com/en/Tanganyika_laughter_epidemic

item.itunes:title: Illegal primes and the Streisand effect - Episode 4
item.title: Illegal primes and the Streisand effect - Episode 4
item.description:
In this episode, James and Oscar discuss illegal prime numbers and stay surprisingly on topic when talking about the Streisand effect.

Show Notes/websites:
https://www.wikiwand.com/en/Illegal_prime
https://www.wikiwand.com/en/Illegal_number
https://www.wikiwand.com/en/Streisand_effect

Visit our website at https://www.wtfwikipedia.com
Join our discord server at https://discord.gg/XeEfps
Support us on patreon at https://www.patreon.com/wtfwikipedia


Support the show (https://www.patreon.com/wtfwikipedia)

item.itunes:title: The London beer and the Boston Molassacre - Episode 3
